name: Public projects & direct doc links
objective: Add per-project public/private visibility: public projects' docs and graph are readable by anonymous visitors and other users (the graph exposes only public-project nodes to outsiders), and every save returns a working direct URL to the doc — replacing the legacy mkdocs url field — shareable when the project is public.

review.note: All S1-S5 validated together: gated suite 96/1 (the 1 = pre-existing D15 only), alembic 0004 round-trip clean, web+cli+parity green, prod live-flip 401->404 cited+reverified. Both intent capabilities delivered; 8 doc versions consolidated.
